mapper.sql: select field_id, project_id, field_key, field_label, field_type, max_length, required, nullable, enabled, is_system, sort_order, type_config, default_value, create_time, update_time from sys_project_defect_field
mapper.select: where project_id = #{projectId} order by sort_order asc, field_id asc
where project_id = #{projectId} and enabled = 1 order by sort_order asc, field_id asc
select count(1) from sys_project_defect_field where project_id = #{projectId} and enabled = 1

select count(1) from sys_defect d where d.project_id = #{projectId} and d.del_flag = '0' and d.custom_fields is not null and JSON_VALUE(d.custom_fields, CONCAT('$.', #{fieldKey})) is not null and trim(coalesce(JSON_VALUE(d.custom_fields, CONCAT('$.', #{fieldKey})), '')) not in ('', 'null', '[]', '{}')

select count(1) from sys_defect d where d.project_id = #{projectId} and d.del_flag = '0' and d.custom_fields is not null and JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(d.custom_fields, CONCAT('$.', #{fieldKey}))) is not null and trim(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(d.custom_fields, CONCAT('$.', #{fieldKey})))) not in ('', 'null', '[]', '{}')
mapper.insert:
insert into sys_project_defect_field
project_id, field_key, field_label, field_type, max_length, required, nullable, enabled, is_system, sort_order, type_config, default_value, create_time, update_time,
#{projectId}, #{fieldKey}, #{fieldLabel}, #{fieldType}, #{maxLength}, #{required}, #{nullable}, #{enabled}, #{isSystem}, #{sortOrder}, #{typeConfig, typeHandler=com.cat2bug.system.domain.handle.JsonMapTypeHandler}, #{defaultValue, typeHandler=com.cat2bug.system.domain.handle.JsonValueTypeHandler}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime},
mapper.update: update sys_project_defect_field set enabled = 0, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where field_id = #{fieldId} and project_id = #{projectId}
mapper.select: select defect_builtin_field_config from sys_project where project_id = #{projectId}
